Categories

The AI uses these names directly — keep them clear.

Data

Reset algorithm

Clears saved site picks and API stats. Tabwise will re-ask and relearn from your corrections.

Export screen time

Download your full history as a CSV file.

Delete all data

Removes all settings, categories, and screen time. Cannot be undone.
